text.title: Gce Spot Vms Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gce-spot-vms methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: tolerance-review
step.output: Decision: proceed OR pivot to standard VMs.
step.decision-gate: If SLO >99.5% → STOP and use standard VMs.

step.name: checkpoint-design
step.action: Add checkpoint write to Cloud Storage at intervals < expected preemption window.

step.name: mixed-mig
step.action: Create mixed MIG with ≥1 standard baseline + Spot for burst.
